results.subject: Brand Protection — relevant for Acme?
results.body:
Hi Maya, There are signs message review and execution discipline matter more right now.
Brand protection helps enforce message relevance without adding manager overhead.
Brand protection helps teams detect risky patterns, prioritize high-impact cases, and route follow-up actions without losing context.
In week one, we'd run a focused sweep and teardown, then hand over a prioritized enforcement workflow by risk tier.
That gives Acme a clearer review path and a tighter escalation workflow without slowing follow-up.

Open to a 15-min chat next week?
